violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris near the bottom of the blade. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to be taken apart and sanitized before next use. Proper sanitizing procedures reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Scoops with handles placed in bins. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
